issues.detail: The skill examples do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Sliding-window rate limit on edge route
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses @upstash/ratelimit with Ratelimit.slidingWindow(10, "10 s"), Redis.fromEnv(), and returns 429 with X-RateLimit-Limit/Remaining/Reset headers from the limit() result; baseline rolls a manual INCR+EXPIRE Redis pattern and skips the prebuilt limiter.

scenarios.name: Daily QStash cron + delayed retry-able job
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses @upstash/qstash Client.publishJSON with cron "0 9 * * *" for the daily report and a separate publishJSON with delay:"30s" and retries:3 for the retry-able job; baseline suggests Vercel Cron or BullMQ and omits the QStash JSON-publishing API entirely.
